【𝗛𝗶𝗴𝗵-𝗬𝗶𝗲𝗹𝗱 𝗣𝗿𝗶𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗣𝗲𝗿𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲】603XL black ink cartridge allows for printing up to 600 pages, while the 603XL Yellow, Magenta, and Cyan Ink Cartridges each offer printing capacities of up to 450 pages (based on 5% coverage of A4/Letter-sized paper)
【𝗖𝗼𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗲𝘁𝗲 𝟭𝟮-𝗣𝗮𝗰𝗸 𝗩𝗮𝗹𝘂𝗲 𝗕𝘂𝗻𝗱𝗹𝗲】3x Black, 3x Cyan, 3x Magenta, 3x Yellow 603XL ink cartridges. Full compatibility with Epson 603/T603/603XL printers - ideal for home offices and frequent users.
【𝗙𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆-𝗖𝗲𝗿𝘁𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗲𝗱 𝗥𝗲𝗹𝗶𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆】Precision-engineered through automated production and stringent triple quality checks for consistent colour accuracy and smooth ink flow.

Plus, we actively reduce waste by reusing friendly shipping materials – every cartridge is guaranteed new and fully functional.
